title: Inverter string
description: Escreva uma função que inverte uma string sem usar reversed().
starter_code: def reverse(s: str) -> str:\n    # seu código aqui\n    return s
solution: def reverse(s: str) -> str:\n    return s[::-1]

title: Rate limiter com Redis
description: Implemente um rate limiter de janela fixa usando Redis (sliding opcional).
starter_code:
import redis.asyncio as redis

async def allow(key: str, limit: int, window: int) -> bool:
    # implemente o rate limiting
    return True
solution:
import redis.asyncio as redis

r = redis.Redis()

async def allow(key: str, limit: int, window: int) -> bool:
    count = await r.incr(key)
    if count == 1:
        await r.expire(key, window)
    return count <= limit

title: Pipeline ETL simples
description: Leia um CSV, limpe valores nulos, agregue por categoria e escreva um Parquet.
starter_code:
import pandas as pd

def etl(src: str, dst: str) -> None:
    # extract, transform, load
    pass
solution:
import pandas as pd

def etl(src: str, dst: str) -> None:
    df = pd.read_csv(src)
    df = df.dropna()
    agg = df.groupby("categoria", as_index=False).sum(numeric_only=True)
    agg.to_parquet(dst, index=False)
